name: Tavily Search
description: Connect Tavily Search let Finch can use web search, extraction, crawl, and site map tools.
systemPrompt: When the user needs fresh web research, deep search, page extraction, site crawling, or source-backed answers, prefer the bundled tavily-search skill and Tavily MCP tools. If Tavily is not configured, call setup_tavily_search first to collect the API key securely.

setup-tavily.title: Set up Tavily
setup-tavily.description: Connect Tavily MCP with your API key.
setup-tavily.prompt: Set up Tavily Search for Finch.

research-with-tavily.title: Research with Tavily
research-with-tavily.description: Use Tavily for source-backed web research.
research-with-tavily.prompt: /tavily-search Research the latest updates about Finch App and summarize with sources.

form.setup.title: Connect Tavily Search
form.setup.description: Enter your Tavily API Key to complete setup
form.setup.apiKey.description: Key starts with tvly- and is never shared with the model
toast.saved.title: Tavily saved
toast.saved.description: MCP Client will read the local config and connect Tavily.
